scroll_found.title: Research the Art Of Smoke scroll at a Research Pedestal

use_smoker.title: Use the Farmer's Delight Smoke Rack to smoke 4 pieces of meat

subtitle.text: The oldest recipe in the world is: apply heat until it doesn't rot.

description: CH.02 · THE ART OF SMOKE
▸ Smoke is the bridge between cooking and preservation.
It changes the flavor.
It changes the shelf life.
It changes what the food means.
◈ SMOKE RACK (FARMER'S DELIGHT)
└ Place over a fire source
└ Insert meat, fish, or other proteins
└ Output: smoked variants with higher saturation
└ Smoked Ham is a high-saturation Protein item
└ Works on: pork, chicken, mutton, fish, beef
◈ WHY SMOKE?
└ Smoked food has higher saturation than raw cooked
└ Smoked fish especially — great for ocean travel
└ Combines with the Food Preservation system
(see: Food Preservation scroll below)
◈ SCROLL: The Art of Smoke
└ Found in: smokehouse ruins, hunter's cabins,
road camp chests, wilderness outpost loot
└ Research time: 20 min
└ Unlocks: smoke rack recipe awareness,
preservation food chain knowledge
▸ The smoke rack runs while you work elsewhere.
Load it. Come back.
The road is fed.
▶ Find The Art of Smoke scroll [check]
▶ Smoke 4 pieces of meat on the Smoke Rack [check]
◇ Food Preservation scroll expands on this.
Smoke + Salt = the Ch02 long-haul food strategy.
